prompt: Create a realistic wide-angle smartphone photo inside an upscale private karaoke lounge or luxury club corridor. Show exactly seven adult women standing in a line across the room, all with intentionally blurred rectangular faces for privacy. They are dressed in elegant evening gowns: 1) far left woman in a champagne glitter sleeveless fitted gown, 2) second woman in a black spaghetti-strap floor-length gown, 3) third woman in a silver sparkling halter top with a pale blue satin high-slit skirt, arms crossed, 4) fourth woman in a black sleeveless high-slit dress, hands clasped, 5) fifth woman in a black deep V-neck spaghetti-strap gown with a thigh slit, 6) sixth woman in a black high-neck sleeveless floor-length dress, hands folded, 7) far right woman closest to camera in a pale blush plunging draped halter gown with jewelry. The setting is dark and luxurious with black marble walls, textured dark wall panels, warm wall sconces, a lit green exit sign above an open doorway, glossy reflective flooring, and a low glass-and-metal table in the foreground with flowers partly visible. Include the partial back and shoulder of a seated customer in the lower right foreground, out of focus, creating a candid social-club perspective. Use dim warm ambient lighting, high ISO phone-camera realism, slight motion softness, natural perspective distortion, muted colors, and a candid documentary feel. No readable text except the exit sign; no logos or watermarks.
